storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH014_SC005

## Production Intent
Execute a high-scale aerial descent transitioning into a grounded arrival at the Emerald City gates. The sequence must manage the scale shift from vast landscape vistas to intimate character reactions of relief and triumph.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- toto
- winged_monkeys

## Required Environments
- aerial_landscape_transit
- The Gates of the Emerald City

## Continuity Constraints
- Visual appearance and scale of The Gates of the Emerald City
- Physical transition from flight mechanics to ground contact/landing

## Beat List
- BT001: Aerial approach to the city
- BT002: Descent toward the gates
- BT003: Safe landing and relief
